headline: Fortive Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Fortive (NYSE:FTV) executives said the company posted a “strong start to the year” in the first quarter of 2026, supported by broad-based demand, continued progress on its Fortive Accelerated strategy, and a significant pace of share repurchases. headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Fortive, Raises Price Target to $65
summary: Citigroup  analyst Andrew Kaplowitz   maintains Fortive (NYSE:FTV) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $64 to $65.

headline: Dolby Q2 Earnings Top Estimates on Licensing Strength, Revenues Up Y/Y
summary: DLB beats Q2 estimates as licensing growth, strong broadcast demand and expanding Dolby Atmos adoption drive revenue and a steady outlook.
